name: iot-project
description: This project is the foundation for a modern task alarm.  The function of this device is to alert the user to know when their task is due or upcoming   How it works     -The Photon is constantly requesting a task from google's API (This is within time reason)     -photon request -> middle man -> Server       -When time is around 1 hour, the middle man will activate asking the server for the time then information gets sent back to the photon.
